scope: Dependencies used by PRISM Media Library and optional face intelligence

dependencies.name: SkiaSharp
dependencies.purpose: Image decoding, resizing and WebP derivative generation

dependencies.name: SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Win32
dependencies.purpose: Windows native runtime assets for SkiaSharp

dependencies.name: SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux.NoDependencies
dependencies.purpose: Linux native runtime assets for SkiaSharp

dependencies.name: Microsoft.ML.OnnxRuntime
dependencies.purpose: Offline CPU inference for approved ONNX face-detection and embedding models
